cards.title: Maulana Abul Kalam Azad
cards.desc: First Education Minister of India. INC President. India Wins Freedom (autobiography). Set up IITs, UGC. Bharat Ratna. Secular nationalist icon.

cards.tags: subash chandra bose netaji ina azad hind freedom ready grp1
cards.title: Subash Chandra Bose (Netaji)
cards.desc: "Give me blood, I will give you freedom." Founded INA (Azad Hind Fauj) & Forward Bloc. Escape to Germany and Japan. Mysterious death in 1945.

cards.tags: rabindranath tagore poet nobel jana gana mana soon grp1
cards.title: Rabindranath Tagore
cards.desc: First Asian Nobel Prize in Literature (1913). Composed Jana Gana Mana (India) & Amar Sonar Bangla (Bangladesh). Gitanjali. Founded Visva-Bharati.
